8347eeaa-14cb-4d0d-b184-4ec65d77e089.title: Add multi-select in file/folder view
8347eeaa-14cb-4d0d-b184-4ec65d77e089.details: I should be able to hold ctrl and select to toggle selection on files/folders. I should also be able to hold shift and do a range selection.

f126b263-166c-42ea-aa00-57a6f8de8620.title: Add delete button to delete selected files/folders
